name: skill-writer
description: Cross-platform meta-skill for creating, evaluating, and optimizing AI assistant skills (supports 7 platforms including MCP)

scripts.build: cd builder && node bin/skill-writer-builder.js build --platform all --output ../platforms
scripts.build:opencode: cd builder && node bin/skill-writer-builder.js build --platform opencode --output ../platforms
scripts.build:openclaw: cd builder && node bin/skill-writer-builder.js build --platform openclaw --output ../platforms
scripts.build:claude: cd builder && node bin/skill-writer-builder.js build --platform claude --output ../platforms
scripts.build:cursor: cd builder && node bin/skill-writer-builder.js build --platform cursor --output ../platforms
scripts.build:openai: cd builder && node bin/skill-writer-builder.js build --platform openai --output ../platforms
scripts.build:gemini: cd builder && node bin/skill-writer-builder.js build --platform gemini --output ../platforms
scripts.build:mcp: cd builder && node bin/skill-writer-builder.js build --platform mcp --output ../platforms
scripts.dev: cd builder && node bin/skill-writer-builder.js dev --platform opencode

author: Skill Writer Team
